zh.lifeSummary: 當Gertrude de Hainault於1109年出生在比利時海瑙特蒙斯時，她的父親Baudouin III de HAINAUT21歲，母親Yolande von Geldern-Wassenberg21歲。她於大約1129年與Roger de Tosny III在法國諾門迪艾康查--結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1194年在英國英格蘭奧可福爾加希頓享年85歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gertrude de Hainault于1109年出生在比利时海瑙特蒙斯时，她的父亲Baudouin III de HAINAUT21岁，母亲Yolande von Geldern-Wassenberg21岁。她于大约1129年与Roger de Tosny III在法国諾門迪艾康查--结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1194年在英国英格兰奧可福爾加希頓享年85岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Gertrude
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Germanic female personal name, derived from gār, gēr ‘spear’ + þrūþ ‘strength’. The name is not found in England immediately after the Conquest, but only in the later Middle English period. It may have been introduced by migrants from the Low Countries who came to England in connection with the cloth trade, and was certainly in consistent use in some areas throughout the 16th and 17th centuries, although it was not generally popular until the 19th century, when many medieval names were revived. It has now fallen from favour again.

en.lifeSummary: When Gertrude de Hainault was born in 1109, in Mons, Hainaut, Belgium, her father, Baudouin III de HAINAUT, was 21 and her mother, Yolande von Geldern-Wassenberg, was 21. She married Roger de Tosny III about 1129, in Conches-en-Ouche, Eure, Normandy, France. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1194, in Garsington, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 85.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gertrude de Hainault est née en 1109, à Mons, Hainaut, Belgique, son père, Baudouin III de HAINAUT, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Yolande von Geldern-Wassenberg, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Roger de Tosny III environ 1129, à Conches-en-Ouche, Eure, Normandie, France. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1194, à Garsington, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 85 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gertrude de Hainault 1109 in Mons, Hennegau, Belgien geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Baudouin III de HAINAUT 21 und ihre Mutter Yolande von Geldern-Wassenberg 21. Sie hat um 1129 in Conches-en-Ouche, Eure, Normandie, Frankreich Roger de Tosny III geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1194 im Alter von 85 Jahren in Garsington, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gertrude de Hainault è nata il nel 1109 nel Mons, Hainaut, Belgio, sua padre, Baudouin III de HAINAUT, aveva 21 anni e sua madre, Yolande von Geldern-Wassenberg, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato Roger de Tosny III circa 1129, nel Conches-en-Ouche, Eure, Normandie, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1194, nel Garsington, Oxfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 85 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Gertrude de Hainaultが1109年にベルギーヘイナトモンスで生まれた時，父Baudouin III de HAINAUTは21歳，母Yolande von Geldern-Wassenbergは21歳であった。約1129年にフランスノーマンディエウアコンチェス-エン-オウチェでRoger de Tosny IIIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1194年にイギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアガーシントンで85歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Gertrude de Hainault(이)가 1109년 벨기에 하인오트 몬스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Baudouin III de HAINAUT(은)는 21세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Yolande von Geldern-Wassenberg(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 대략 1129년 프랑스 노먼디 우르 콘체스--우체에서 Roger de Tosny III(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1194년 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르 가징턴에서 85세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gertrude de Hainault nasceu em 1109, em Mons, Hainaut, Bélgica, seu pai, Baudouin III de HAINAUT, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Yolande von Geldern-Wassenberg, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com Roger de Tosny III aproximadamente 1129, em Conches-en-Ouche, Eure, Normandie, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1194, em Garsington, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 85 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gertrude de Hainault родилась в 1109 г. в местности монс, ханаут, Бельгия, её отцу по имени Baudouin III de HAINAUT было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Yolande von Geldern-Wassenberg, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Roger de Tosny III около 1129 г. в местности кончес-ен-оуч, эур, норманди, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1194 г. в местности гарсингтон, оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 85 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gertrude de Hainault nació en 1109, en Mons, Hainaut, Bélgica, su papá, Baudouin III de HAINAUT, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Yolande von Geldern-Wassenberg, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Roger de Tosny III aproximadamente 1129, en Conches-en-Ouche, Eure, Normandie, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1194, en Garsington, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 85 años.
